commands.review_summary:
This PR adds `localModelLean: "auto"`, forwards resolved model context caps into agent tool construction and `tools.effective` inventory, and updates focused local-model docs and tests.

PR surface: Source +109, Tests +359, Docs +2. Total +470 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/config PR rather than a current-main bug report. The source comparison shows current main lacks the `"auto"` config path and the PR adds that behavior directly.

target.title: feat(agents): auto-trim lean local model tools
target.body:
## Summary

- add `localModelLean: "auto"` so smaller resolved model context caps trim the browser, cron, and message tools without forcing the setting on larger models
- route effective model context caps, including provider-level `contextTokens`, into agent tool construction and `tools.effective` inventory so advertised tools match runtime behavior
- document the local-model lean workflow for Ollama and local gateway troubleshooting

Related to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599, but does not close it. This PR only addresses the small/local model tool-surface pressure lane.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/context-window-guard.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.hints.test.ts --reporter=dot` - 4 shards passed, 165 tests passed
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/context-window-guard.ts src/agents/context-window-guard.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts` - passed
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md` - passed
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md` - passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` - passed
- Autoreview: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- AWS Crabbox changed gate: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`; provider=aws, lease=cbx_d1b1d8ce1dd8, slug=tidal-hermit, run=run_c9f3725050af, machine=c7a.8xlarge, exit=0, leaseStopped=true

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `localModelLean: "auto"` now trims heavyweight default tools when the resolved/effective model context cap is 64K tokens or smaller, including provider-level `contextTokens`, while leaving larger models on the full default tool surface.
Real environment tested: Local targeted Vitest/docs/format checks, autoreview, and AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: See the Verification section above.
Evidence after fix: Unit and integration tests cover agent-level overrides, auto threshold behavior, provider-level context caps, provider caps bounded by smaller model windows, runtime tool creation, and `tools.effective` inventory projection.
Observed result after fix: The branch passes focused local proof and remote `pnpm check:changed` on AWS Crabbox.
What was not tested: Live Ollama runtime was not rerun in this refresh; earlier API smoke remains useful context, but this update was verified through deterministic config/runtime tests and Crabbox changed gate.
target.author: vincentkoc
